game_difficulty.shipbuilder_description: If you want to peacefully build your ship or just explore. Threats will be mostly non-existent and factions will be mostly friendly. Your pawns will have a permanent mood buff.
game_difficulty.timid_description: For those that prefer a more laid back slightly easier experience. Threats will be lower and incidents will be less frequent.
game_difficulty.normal_description: This offers the standard classic experience. Best suited to those that have played before.
game_difficulty.brutal_description: Only choose this option if you want a real challenge, this is only advised for more experienced players. Incidents will be more hostile and will occur much more frequently. Factions will be more foe than friend.

game_type.progressive_description: Creates a more harmonious and laid back experience. Here there is still some randomisation but not as much. Incidents will be more calculated and progressive, giving you extra breathing space.
game_type.random_description: Faction alignment, incidents and various other elements of the game will be much more randomised offering more drama and a higher replay value. Things could either go really well or horribly wrong.

game_settings.world_seed_description: Here you can change the random seed for the current universe. You can then share this seed so others can play the same universe as you.
game_settings.seed_line_edit_hint: Start typing to choose your own seed.

restart_game_prompt: You must restart the game for the adjusted mods to be loaded correctly.
game_over_pawns_dead:
All your pawns are dead and there is no one left to run your ship.
You can either choose to leave and exit back to the main menu, or you can continue in the hope someone will rescue your ship and allow you to continue.
game_over_ship_blown:
Your ship has been blown to pieces and any survivors will surely die, floating in the cold, dark vastness of space, 
watching their air and energy levels slowly decrease to zero.
You can either choose to leave and exit back to the main menu, or you can continue in hope of some miracle.
quit_confirm: Are you sure? If you quit now you will lose any unsaved progress.
ship_arrived: The {ship_name} is now in comms range
hull_total: The total current hull health compared to the maximum possible.
heat_total:
Overall average temperature of this facility: {current_temp}{unit}.
A higher temperature means a higher chance for fires to start.
atmosphere_total:
The overall breathable air compared to
the maximum internal pressure.
en_power_source:
The amount of power added to the grid
compared to the amount available.
en_power_receiver:
The amount of power taken from the grid
compared to the amount needed.
en_battery:
The amount of power stored compared to
the amount it can store.
en_work_to_build:
How much work there is left
to build this object.
flag_for_deconstruction_cancel: Request this item to be deconstructed.

room_panel.oxygen_pressure: The current oxygen pressure in this room.
room_panel.carbon_dioxide_pressure: The current carbon dioxide pressure in this room.
room_panel.hazardous_gas_pressure: The current amount of hazardous gas in this room.

character_panel.health: How much health this creature has.
character_panel.gas_tank_level: How much air the currently equipped gas tank has remaining.

object_panel.air_source: The amount of gas being produced.
object_panel.stored_air: The amount of gas currently stored.
object_panel.stored_power: The amount of power currently stored.

morale_panel.morale:
{percentage}%

Mood reflects this creatures frame of mind.

If this gets too low then this creature may decide
to ignore commands or far worse.
morale_panel.hunger:
{percentage}%

Hunger relates to the amount of solids this creature
has consumed recently.
morale_panel.thirst:
{percentage}%

Thirst relates to the amount of fluids this creature
has consumed recently.
morale_panel.energy:
{percentage}%

Energy relates to the amount of energy this creature
can exert before becoming exhausted.

equipment_panel.temperature_range: The range of temperature this creature feels most comfortable.
equipment_panel.durability: Total durability of all items equipped.

crew_panel.always_try_wear_spacesuit: Select to ensure this character will always try and wear a full spacesuit if available.
crew_panel.allow_removal_of_helmet: Select to allow this character to remove their helmet whenever possible.

systems_power_button: Turn all the ships power on or off.
black_alert: Black Alert: Everyone get back to the ship!
jump_to_high_burn: Propel to high burn. Warning: Doing so will leave everything in this sector behind.
drop_from_high_burn:
Drop from high burn. Doing so will leave you vulnerable to your surroundings.
You will also need to recharge your burn meter.
pawn_initiated_trade: {pawn_name} has initiated trade with a social skill of {skill_level}
sys_ship_name_button:
The ships currently registered name. 
Click to rename this ship.
sys_captain_button:
The current captain of this ship.
Click to assign a new captain.
sys_quartermaster_button:
The current quartermaster of this ship.
Click to assign a new quartermaster.

facility_panel.bribe_info: Bribing a ship could increase your relations with the faction they belong to. If they are hostile and you are successful they may decide to leave rather than take offensive action. Be warned though that a failed bribe attempt could have catastrophic consequences.
facility_panel.no_communication_device: You need a communication device to initiate communications!
facility_panel.no_pawn_to_communicate: There is no one to open communications.
facility_panel.no_trade_low_relation: Unable to trade due to low relations!
facility_panel.no_trade_no_pawn: There is no one to initiate a trade.
facility_panel.no_bribe_no_pawn: There is no one to initiate a bribe.
facility_panel.no_bribe_no_credits: You cannot afford to do this!
facility_panel.ship_cannot_afford_this: This trader cannot afford to buy this!
facility_panel.player_not_enough_credits: You do not have enough credits to buy this!
facility_panel.hint_ship_trading: Trading requires you to have positive relations, a Comms console, and someone to initiate the trade.
facility_panel.hint_bribe_ship: If this ship is hostile, bribing them may force them to leave.
facility_panel.already_bribed: This ship has already been bribed
facility_panel.attempt_to_bribe: You can attempt to bribe this ship for {bribe_amount} credits.

click_to_center: Click here to jump to the subject.
fatal_error_files_missing_or_corrupt: FATAL ERROR: Files missing or corrupt needed to run the game. {message}. Shutting down! - please check for file or folder typo's or re-download the files and report a bug with your log data.
nowhere_to_drink: There is nowhere for your crew to drink from
nowhere_to_eat: There is nowhere for your crew to eat from
nowhere_to_sleep: There are no available beds for your crew to sleep in
nothing_to_drink: Your crew has nothing to drink
nothing_to_eat: Your crew has nothing to eat

notification.ran_out_of_fuel: A {entity} has ran out of fuel.
notification.nothing_to_cancel: There is nothing to cancel here.
notification.build_transponder_first: You must build a transponder before you can build this.
notification.unable_to_place_zone_here: Unable to place a zone here.
notification.no_path_nearby: There is no path nearby to move to.

date.time_display: Space Date: {hours} hour on the {day} of the {month} of {year}.

backstory.joined_crew: {pawn_name} joined your crew on the {day} of the {month} of {year}.
backstory.age_gender_and_species_status: is a {species} {gender} and was born on the {day} of the {month} of {year}, which makes {pawn_reflexive_short} {age} years of age
